docs.title: Hi, I'm Marian
docs.text:
I am an aspiring Data Analyst / Data Scientist with a strong interest in turning raw data into meaningful insights.

My work focuses on the full data workflow — from data collection and cleaning to analysis, visualization, and machine learning. I enjoy building projects that combine Python, SQL, and data visualization tools to solve real-world problems.

docs.title: Skills
docs.text:
• Programming: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)
  • Data Visualization: Tableau, Matplotlib, Seaborn
  • Data Analysis: Exploratory Data Analysis, Statistical Analysis
  • Databases: SQL
  • Data Collection: Web scraping and data extraction
  • Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Jupyter Notebook

docs.title: What you'll find in this portfolio
docs.text:
This portfolio contains projects demonstrating:

  • Data cleaning and preprocessing
  • Exploratory data analysis
  • Machine learning models
  • Interactive dashboards
  • Web scraping and automated data collection
  • Data storytelling and visualization

Go to Projects to explore my work.

Project Information | Tableau British Airways Reviews Analysis Tableau Data Visualization Customer Reviews Data Analysis

Interactive Tableau dashboard analysing British Airways customer reviews, satisfaction patterns, and key service trends.
